integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenMaint web interface, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a terminal or database client to directly update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows with SQL commands or database clients (like psql) are visible.

integrity.description: The approval text was entered into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text '[SHUTDOWN ACCESS APPROVED]' is seen within the OpenMaint text fields, not just overlaid or edited in a separate text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Shutdown window: April 6 to April 10, 2026. Resumption Date: April 13, 2026. Critical priority items (in-window): WO-SHUT-001 (April 7) and WO-SHUT-003 (April 8). These require '[SHUTDOWN ACCESS APPROVED]' in description/notes, dates unchanged. Non-critical items (in-window): WO-SHUT-002 (April 7), WO-SHUT-004 (April 9), WO-SHUT-005 (April 10). These must be rescheduled to April 13, 2026. Trap items (do not modify): WO-SHUT-006 (Completed, April 8), WO-SHUT-007 (April 1, before window), WO-SHUT-008 (April 15, after window).
